name: Comets on Fire
description: '''Comets on Fire''' were an American [[noise rock]] band from [[Santa Cruz, California|Santa Cruz]] in [[California]] that released four studio albums between 2001 and 2006. The band was formed in 1999 by [[guitarist]] and [[vocalist]] Ethan Miller and longtime friend bassist Ben Flashman, who were seeking to create rhythmically and sonically intense music that paid no attention to categorizations.
